label: Attractor
text: GenericConcept Attractor ‚Äî formula: A ‚Äî A system's tendency to converge toward a stable state, equilibrium, or fixed point. Found in homeostasis, machine learning loss convergence, ecological carrying capacity.

label: Bifurcation
text: GenericConcept Bifurcation ‚Äî formula: D‚äóF‚äóI ‚Äî A system splits into two distinct branches at a critical point. Found in phase transitions, evolutionary speciation, market crashes.

label: BoundaryCondition
text: GenericConcept BoundaryCondition ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóV‚äóR ‚Äî Constraints defining limits of a system's operational domain. Found in differential equations, legal frameworks, cell membrane permeability.

label: Calibration
text: GenericConcept Calibration ‚Äî formula: A‚äóI‚äóV‚äóR ‚Äî Systematic alignment of a measurement or representation to a reference standard. Found in sensor tuning, model fine-tuning, musical temperament.

label: Cascade
text: GenericConcept Cascade ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóD‚äóF ‚Äî Sequential amplification chain where each stage triggers the next. Found in blood coagulation, nuclear fission, viral spread, market panic.

label: Channel
text: GenericConcept Channel ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóIm ‚Äî A directed conduit for information, matter, or energy flow between two endpoints. Found in neural axons, TCP/IP connections, river channels.

label: Classifier
text: GenericConcept Classifier ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóD‚äóF‚äóR ‚Äî A system that assigns inputs to discrete categories. Found in immune recognition (self/non-self), spam filters, biological taxonomy.

label: Component
text: GenericConcept Component ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóR ‚Äî A delimited sub-unit of a system with defined interfaces and role. Found in organs, circuit elements, software modules.

label: Composition
text: GenericConcept Composition / Decomposition ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóA ‚Äî Assembly of parts producing emergent properties absent in individual components. Found in protein folding, orchestras, ecosystem food webs.

label: Constraint
text: GenericConcept Constraint ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóV‚äóR ‚Äî A structural or operational limit bounding a system's behavior space. Found in enzyme active sites, constitutional law, physical constants.

label: Context
text: GenericConcept Context ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóO ‚Äî The environmental frame that modulates the meaning or behavior of a system. Found in language pragmatics, drug receptor context, situational ethics.

label: Convergence
text: GenericConcept Convergence / Divergence ‚Äî formula: D ‚Äî Tendency of trajectories to approach a common point (or spread apart). Found in evolutionary convergence, market equilibrium, mathematical series.

label: Dissipation
text: GenericConcept Dissipation ‚Äî formula: D‚äóF‚äóV ‚Äî Irreversible loss of ordered energy to the environment. Found in friction, metabolic heat loss, information entropy.

label: Emergence
text: GenericConcept Emergence ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóD‚äóV ‚Äî Global properties arising from local interactions not present in individual components. Found in consciousness, market prices, ant colony intelligence.

label: Environment
text: GenericConcept Environment ‚Äî formula: F‚äóI‚äóO ‚Äî The external context supplying inputs and receiving outputs of a system. Found in cell cytoplasm, market conditions, software runtime.

label: Evaluation
text: GenericConcept Evaluation ‚Äî formula: A‚äóI‚äóV‚äóO‚äóR ‚Äî A process that measures system state against a reference criterion. Found in immune surveillance, code review, scientific peer review.

label: Event
text: GenericConcept Event ‚Äî formula: D‚äóI‚äóO ‚Äî A discrete, observable occurrence that alters system state. Found in synaptic firing, market ticks, phase transition onset.

label: Feedback
text: GenericConcept Feedback ‚Äî formula: A‚äóF‚äóD ‚Äî Return of system output as input, either amplifying (positive) or stabilizing (negative). Found in RAAS blood pressure control, thermostat, neural learning.

label: Filter
text: GenericConcept Filter ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóA ‚Äî Selective gate that passes or blocks elements based on defined criteria. Found in kidneys, spam filters, optics, immune tolerance.

label: Flow
text: GenericConcept Flow ‚Äî formula: F ‚Äî Directed movement of matter, energy, or information through a system. Found in blood circulation, electrical current, data packets, river hydrology.

label: Gradient
text: GenericConcept Gradient ‚Äî formula: F ‚Äî A spatial or temporal differential driving directed flow. Found in concentration gradients, temperature gradients, potential difference.

label: Hierarchy
text: GenericConcept Hierarchy ‚Äî formula: A‚äóS‚äóV‚äóR ‚Äî A nested ordering of components by authority, scale, or abstraction level. Found in taxonomies, corporate structures, OSI model layers.

label: Homeostasis
text: GenericConcept Homeostasis ‚Äî formula: A‚äóS‚äóF‚äóV‚äóE ‚Äî Dynamic self-regulation maintaining internal variables within viable bounds. Found in blood pressure, body temperature, ecological balance, economic equilibrium.

label: Hub
text: GenericConcept Hub ‚Äî formula: S‚äóF‚äóE ‚Äî A high-connectivity node in a network that concentrates flow. Found in airport hubs, protein interaction hubs, neural ganglia.

label: Identity
text: GenericConcept Identity ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóA‚äóV‚äóE ‚Äî Persistent self-recognition enabling a system to distinguish self from non-self. Found in immune system, brand identity, cryptographic signatures.

label: Imbrication
text: GenericConcept Imbrication ‚Äî formula: S‚äóS ‚Äî Nested overlapping of structural levels creating layered redundancy. Found in geological strata, nested software architectures, fractal structures.

label: Information
text: GenericConcept Information ‚Äî formula: I ‚Äî Structured difference that makes a difference; the encoding of distinctions. Found in DNA sequences, neural firing rates, Shannon entropy, market signals.

label: Invariant
text: GenericConcept Invariant ‚Äî formula: A‚äóS‚äóV ‚Äî A property preserved under transformations or perturbations. Found in conservation laws, mathematical groups, constitutional rights.

label: Language
text: GenericConcept Language ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóA‚äóR ‚Äî A formal system of symbols with grammar generating valid expressions. Found in natural languages, programming languages, biochemical signaling codes.

label: Link
text: GenericConcept Link ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóV ‚Äî A structural connection enabling flow or information exchange between components. Found in synapses, network edges, molecular bonds.

label: Mediator
text: GenericConcept Mediator ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóO ‚Äî An intermediary component that facilitates interaction between two otherwise incompatible or non-adjacent elements. Found in enzymes, diplomatic negotiators, middleware.

label: Memory
text: GenericConcept Memory ‚Äî formula: D‚äóF‚äóD ‚Äî Capacity to retain and later retrieve information about past states. Found in long-term potentiation, computer RAM, cultural transmission.

label: Modularity
text: GenericConcept Modularity ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóIm ‚Äî Decomposition of a system into independently operable, interchangeable units. Found in gene regulatory modules, microservices, LEGO architecture.

label: Network
text: GenericConcept Network ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóD‚äóIm ‚Äî A topology of interconnected nodes enabling distributed flow and communication. Found in neural networks, internet, social networks, metabolic networks.

label: Observer
text: GenericConcept Observer ‚Äî formula: A‚äóI‚äóR ‚Äî An agent that monitors system state without (ideally) disturbing it. Found in scientific measurement, immune surveillance, market watchers.

label: Oscillator
text: GenericConcept Oscillator ‚Äî formula: S‚äóA‚äóI‚äóD‚äóF ‚Äî A system producing periodic repetition through circular trajectory. Found in VCO circuits, circadian rhythms, pendulums, economic cycles.

label: Path
text: GenericConcept Path ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóD‚äóO ‚Äî A trajectory through state space connecting initial and final configurations. Found in metabolic pathways, neural signal paths, narrative arcs.

label: Pattern
text: GenericConcept Pattern ‚Äî formula: S‚äóIt‚äóA‚äóR‚äóIm ‚Äî A recurrent, recognizable structural configuration across instances. Found in fractals, design patterns, genomic motifs, musical themes.

label: Process
text: GenericConcept Process ‚Äî formula: D‚äóF‚äóS‚äóI ‚Äî A temporally ordered sequence of transformations advancing toward an outcome. Found in metabolism, manufacturing pipeline, algorithm execution.

label: Processor
text: GenericConcept Processor ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóF‚äóD‚äóIm ‚Äî An active component that transforms inputs into outputs via defined operations. Found in kidney, transistor, CPU, enzyme.

label: Propagation
text: GenericConcept Propagation ‚Äî formula: F‚äóD‚äóS ‚Äî Spread of a signal, pattern, or state through a medium or network. Found in epidemic spread, neural action potentials, market contagion, wave propagation.

label: Regulation
text: GenericConcept Regulation ‚Äî formula: A‚äóF‚äóV ‚Äî Active control mechanism maintaining system variables within defined bounds. Found in gene expression regulation, central banking, immune tolerance.

label: Resource
text: GenericConcept Resource ‚Äî formula: S‚äóF‚äóV ‚Äî A consumable or renewable input required for system operation. Found in ATP in metabolism, memory in computing, capital in economics.

label: Representation
text: GenericConcept Representation ‚Äî formula: I‚äóR ‚Äî A structured encoding that stands for a real-world phenomenon in a formal system. Found in mental models, scientific theories, ontologies, maps.

label: Signal
text: GenericConcept Signal ‚Äî formula: I‚äóF‚äóO ‚Äî A structured, observable carrier of information between system components. Found in hormones, electromagnetic waves, API responses, action potentials.

label: Symmetry
text: GenericConcept Symmetry ‚Äî formula: S ‚Äî Invariance of structure under a class of transformations. Found in crystal lattices, biological bilateral symmetry, physical conservation laws.

label: Synergy
text: GenericConcept Synergy ‚Äî formula: D‚äóI‚äóR ‚Äî Emergent benefit from combination exceeding sum of parts. Found in drug combinations, team dynamics, chemical catalysis, evolutionary symbiosis.

label: Threshold
text: GenericConcept Threshold ‚Äî formula: A‚äóI‚äóO ‚Äî A critical value triggering qualitative state change when crossed. Found in action potential firing (~-55mV), phase transitions, market circuit breakers.

label: Topology
text: GenericConcept Topology ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóA‚äóV ‚Äî The relational structure of connections independent of metric distance. Found in network graph topology, protein folding topology, manifold geometry.

label: Transformation
text: GenericConcept Transformation ‚Äî formula: S‚äóI‚äóD‚äóF‚äóV ‚Äî An irreversible conversion of system state producing qualitatively different output. Found in metamorphosis, phase transitions, chemical synthesis, learning.

label: Trigger
text: GenericConcept Trigger ‚Äî formula: D‚äóI‚äóV ‚Äî A minimal input event that initiates a disproportionate downstream response. Found in enzyme activation, immune priming, market circuit breakers.

label: Workflow
text: GenericConcept Workflow ‚Äî formula: D‚äóF‚äóS‚äóV ‚Äî A structured sequence of steps with defined ordering constraints. Found in immune response stages, assembly lines, software CI/CD pipelines.
